Shane McGrath talks Kilkenny's chances of challenging for provincial honours again in 2026

item.title: GAAPlusOfficial: GAA+ @GAAPlusOfficial · 29min The second leg of our LSHC double-header comes from Tullamore tomorrow (Sat) evening. Puck
item.description: GAA+ @GAAPlusOfficial · 29min The second leg of our LSHC double-header comes from Tullamore tomorrow (Sat) evening. Puck of a ball between them in last year's corresponding game. Our pre-match focus on this one begins at approx 6.20pm... 244
